title: Diffusion Models explained..
summary: A video explanation of diffusion models covering their progression, strengths, weaknesses, and how they work as a framework rather than a single architecture. The video discusses how diffusion can be implemented with transformers such as DiT and explores the theory and practical applications of the diffusion process.
